name: Error Recovery
summary: Conformance reference for mechanism failure recovery via pluggable handlers. Defines the CustomRecoveryHandler contract, registry resolution pattern, observable states, and the #1032 error-recovery semantics: a normalized failure disposition (transient/terminal/deferred) and an open recovery-phase meta-schema (core retrying/queued/awaiting-manual; circuit-open a registered extension), with raw classification, backoff math, and composition order kept private to handlers. Applies to any operation — HTTP, database, computation, async tasks.
